sections.title: Core
sections.description: Live named exports for core builders, runtime wiring, and state-owned commands.

entries.name: createKey
entries.description: Stable resource keys.

entries.name: createTag
entries.description: Shared invalidation tags.

entries.name: resource
entries.description: Canonical shared reads.

entries.name: transaction
entries.description: Typed writes with preview, routes, invalidation, and concurrency.

entries.name: machine
entries.description: Workflow state, legal events, guards, updates, and state-owned work.

entries.name: view
entries.description: Optional multi-source UI projections.

entries.name: module
entries.description: Domain manifests with inventory, fixtures, and validation.

entries.name: app
entries.description: App composition from modules.

entries.name: runtime
entries.description: Runtime bridge for resources, actors, inspection, and boot hydration.

entries.name: selectView
entries.description: View selection outside React.

entries.name: outcomes
entries.description: Transaction outcome routing.

entries.name: store
entries.description: Store installers for live and test runtimes.

entries.name: orchestrators
entries.description: Orchestrator installers for live and test runtimes.

entries.name: ensure
entries.description: Required resource dependency for a state.

entries.name: observe
entries.description: Active subscription to a resource.

entries.name: refresh
entries.description: Explicit resource refresh.

entries.name: run
entries.description: Run a transaction from a state.

entries.name: patch
entries.description: Patch a resource and record receipts.

entries.name: invalidate
entries.description: Mark refs, tags, or filters stale.

entries.name: stream
entries.description: State-scoped ongoing values.

entries.name: after
entries.description: One-shot delayed transitions.

entries.name: child
entries.description: Parent-owned child actors.

entries.name: can
entries.description: Legal-command checks.

sections.title: React
sections.description: React-only runtime bindings for providers, actor reads, resource reads, and view reads.

entries.name: FlowProvider
entries.description: Runtime boundary for React hooks.

entries.name: useResource
entries.description: Provider-backed resource reads.

entries.name: useActor
entries.description: Provider-backed actor creation and subscription.

entries.name: useView
entries.description: Explicit view projection in React.

sections.title: Testing
sections.description: Focused builders, story helpers, controlled streams, and debug formatters for testing lanes.

entries.name: test
entries.description: Preferred builder for focused `test(machine).with(...).run()` scenarios.

entries.name: flowTest
entries.description: Narrow migration alias for `flowTest(machine).start()`.

entries.name: createControlledStream
entries.description: Deterministic stream control for harness and runtime tests.

entries.name: runFlowScenario
entries.description: Execute default-start or snapshot-start stories in tests.

entries.name: runFlowScenarioWithDiagnostics
entries.description: Execute a story and keep the pending-work diagnostics alongside the run result.

entries.name: scenarioToReport
entries.description: Turn a Scenario outcome into a reusable pass/fail report.

entries.name: formatHarnessTracePretty
entries.description: Pretty-print a harness trace for debugging.

entries.name: formatPendingWorkPretty
entries.description: Pretty-print pending work while a test is stuck.

entries.name: formatScenarioTranscript
entries.description: Format scenario receipts as a readable transcript.

entries.name: formatTransactionEventsPretty
entries.description: Pretty-print transaction receipts and routed events.

sections.title: Server
sections.description: Request-scoped runtime boot helpers and typed boot payload boundaries.

entries.name: withRequestRuntime
entries.description: Create and dispose one runtime per server request.

sections.title: Inspect
sections.description: Machine analysis, behavior-contract builders, trace formatting, story descriptors, and live runtime inspection helpers.

entries.name: graphOf
entries.description: Machine graph descriptors.

entries.name: buildBehaviorContract
entries.description: Build the canonical app-level behavior contract from an assembled app and explicit stories.

entries.name: diffBehaviorContracts
entries.description: Compare two behavior contracts section-by-section, with optional module-slice filtering before diffing.

entries.name: renderBehaviorContract
entries.description: Render the shared behavior brief from the canonical contract.

entries.name: renderBehaviorCoverage
entries.description: Render the detailed story-coverage view from the live behavior gateway inputs.

entries.name: renderBehaviorDiff
entries.description: Render the human-readable report from a structured behavior-contract diff.

entries.name: sliceBehaviorContract
entries.description: Derive a module-focused behavior lens from the assembled app contract.

entries.name: captureTrace
entries.description: Capture a trace descriptor from a snapshot.

entries.name: analyzeTrace
entries.description: Machine-aware analysis from a captured trace.

entries.name: diffTrace
entries.description: Section-by-section comparison of two traces.

entries.name: exportTraceArtifact
entries.description: Export a versioned JSON-safe trace artifact.

entries.name: importTraceArtifact
entries.description: Validate and rehydrate a trace artifact.

entries.name: compressTraceArtifact
entries.description: Gzip a trace artifact for transport or storage.

entries.name: decompressTraceArtifact
entries.description: Restore a gzipped trace artifact.

entries.name: summarizeTrace
entries.description: Concise incident summary from a trace.

entries.name: formatTrace
entries.description: Format a captured trace.

entries.name: formatTracePretty
entries.description: Pretty-print a captured trace.

entries.name: whyNoTransition
entries.description: Explain why an event had no legal transition.

entries.name: formatNoTransitionSummary
entries.description: Summarize why an event could not transition.

entries.name: formatResourceFreshnessReport
entries.description: Summarize resource freshness changes from a trace.

entries.name: formatTransactionOverlapSummary
entries.description: Summarize overlapping transaction activity.

entries.name: formatRehydrationSummary
entries.description: Summarize boot and rehydration facts from a trace.

entries.name: flowStories
entries.description: Story descriptors for docs and inspection.

entries.name: storyToDoc
entries.description: Turn a story into a docs-friendly descriptor.

entries.name: attachInspectionSink
entries.description: Stream live runtime inspection entries into a sink.

entries.name: createInspectionBufferSink
entries.description: Buffer inspection messages in memory.

entries.name: formatInspectionEvent
entries.description: Format one inspection event.

entries.name: formatInspectionEventPretty
entries.description: Pretty-print one inspection event.

entries.name: formatInspectionTimeline
entries.description: Format an inspection timeline.

entries.name: formatInspectionTimelinePretty
entries.description: Pretty-print an inspection timeline.

entries.name: createLocalInspectionProof
entries.description: Combine trace and inspection events into a local proof.

entries.name: inspectActions
entries.description: Inspect action scheduling and execution facts.

entries.name: inspectMicrosteps
entries.description: Inspect microstep expansion and ordering facts.

entries.name: inspectTransition
entries.description: Inspect one transition attempt in detail.
